title: Vidence Clothes Pegs, 50 Pcs Durable Clothes Pegs for Washing Line with 5 Colors, Non-Slip Laundry Pegs with Strong Spring, Washing Line Pegs Fit for Washing Line, Food Bags, Photos.
features: Durable Design- Our clothes pegs for the washing line are made of PP material and stainless steel spring which is not easy to rust and doesn't leave remarks on the clothes. The strong clothes pegs have a better thickness that is not easy to break. It can also be used in the sun without worrying about the clip becoming brittle for a long time.

Good Performance- The washing line pegs with a non-slip design that doesn't slip off easily. And the plastic pegs have a strong holder which makes clothes not easy to be blown off in the strong wind. It can reflect the strong grip of the plastic pegs for the washing line.

Multi-color laundry pegs- Our washing pegs set contains 5 colors orange, green, sky blue, dark blue and green. You can choose different colors according to your own preferences. It can add some color to your boring drying process and make you have a good mood.

Wide application- Plastic pegs have a wide range of applications. Not just clip the clothes, the socks and the towels, but also can clip photos and your unfinished snacks bags. It applies to all aspects of your life.

What it brings to you- You will get 50 pcs of clothes pegs in 5 colors for the washing line and daily life. Each washing line peg is 20 x 19.98 x 5 cm. Although it's not big, it can clip a lot of things.
description: From the manufacturer Colorful Clothes Pegs for Washing Line · Includes Interlocking Soft Cushioned Grip - no unwanted peg marks or pulls on your clothes. · Secure Grip - the clothes pegs are designed to be kind to your clothes while ensuring your clothes are held safely on the line! · Vibrant Colours- Clothes clips come in a variety of random colours, suitable for class, photo clips, clothes drying and other purposes.
